title: felicia tenera
intro: Felicia tenera, also known as the Blue Felicia or Blue Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Felicia tenera include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used topically in the form of creams and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
